model.name: LightGBM (calibrated, no-treatment, v2 features)
model.calibration_note: chosen over class-weighting for probability calibration (Brier 0.014 vs 0.037)
model.vs_v1_baseline: v2 feature engineering: PR-AUC 0.8813 -> 0.9146; log loss 0.157 -> 0.121

business.assumptions: 30% success, NT$30 offer, ~3mo protected, NT$100k budget, held-out test set
business.risk_concentration: Critical segment (95%+) = 3.6% of customers but ~55% of total value-at-risk (NT$10.25M of ~NT$19M)
business.addressable_opportunity: High + Very-High bands (50-95%): ~1,550 customers, ~NT$3.9M at risk, where interventions still work

mlops.drift_note: behavioral/pricing shift between established vs newer subscribers

experiments.log_trend_features: tested and rejected (max corr 0.035) — churn is renewal-driven, not engagement-driven
experiments.optuna_finding: hyperparameters not the bottleneck (tuned 0.884 vs baseline 0.8813, +0.003); features govern performance
experiments.total_paid_ablation: removed as redundant recency proxy, -0.004 PR-AUC (noise)
